entities.name: WIND EROSION
entities.description: A major land degradation process caused by wind that constrains agricultural production in the Sahel.

entities.name: WEST AFRICAN SAHEL
entities.description: A region in West Africa characterized by harsh environmental conditions.

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A country in the Sahel where a village-level survey on wind erosion was conducted.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing crops and livestock, which is constrained by environmental and socioeconomic issues.

entities.name: VILLAGE-LEVEL SURVEY
entities.description: A research approach used to assess farmers' views on constraints to agricultural production.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: An environmental constraint to agricultural production in the Sahel.

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: A factor affecting agricultural production, ranked as a constraint alongside wind erosion and drought.

entities.name: HEALTH PROBLEMS
entities.description: Issues affecting human health that are related to wind erosion.

entities.name: CROP DAMAGE
entities.description: Physical harm to crops caused by wind erosion.

entities.name: LOSS OF TOPSOIL
entities.description: The removal of the upper layer of soil due to wind erosion.

entities.name: DEFORESTATION
entities.description: The removal of forests, identified as a major contributor to soil losses by wind.

entities.name: REMOVAL OF CROP RESIDUE
entities.description: The practice of clearing crop remains from the field, contributing to wind erosion.

entities.name: LAND-CLEARING PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural practices involving the clearing of land, contributing to soil losses by wind.

entities.name: LEAVING CROP RESIDUE IN THE FIELD
entities.description: A low-cost technology implemented by farmers to control wind erosion.

entities.name: MULCHING
entities.description: A low-cost technology used by farmers to mitigate wind erosion.

entities.name: NATURAL REGENERATION OF VEGETATION
entities.description: A low-cost technology used to address wind erosion by allowing vegetation to regrow.

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The deterioration of land quality, of which wind erosion is a major process.

relationships.source: LEAVING CROP RESIDUE IN THE FIELD
